question: In the final year shown, what does the largest colored area represent?

options.A: The green area (Segment B) shows the largest share.
options.B: The green area (Segment C) represents the dominant share.
options.C: Cannot determine what the largest segment represents without a legend to explain the color coding.
options.D: The purple area (Segment D) represents the largest share.

explanation: The chart shows different colored areas but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category holds the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
